title: Fresh Syrian Chickpeas Flatbread
description: A yeasty and springy flatbread filled with chickpeas and pickle, perfect for a quick and flexitarian-friendly meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add the water to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 4 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Brush the dough with olive oil and sprinkle with sumac if using.
Top each flatbread with chickpeas and pickle, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges over the filling to form a crust and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
